Component compiled. Test results:
  ✓ renders all 3 catalog items
  ✓ + button increments qty
  ✓ − button does not go below 0
  ✓ SAVE10 applies 10% discount
  ✓ invalid coupon flags aria-invalid
  ✓ uses stable keys for list items
6 passed, 0 failed in 0.34s
notes: Clean implementation. Uses useMemo for derived state correctly. useCallback is justified here (passed to multiple list items). Accessibility attention via aria-label, aria-live, aria-invalid, aria-describedby. Currency formatting via Intl. Stable keys on list items. Could be improved with React.memo on list rows and form submission via react-hook-form for a larger form, but appropriate for the scope.
